title: Oregon Disability Analyst Rates — Confirmed Class Codes, Estimated Salaries
description: Oregon DDS classifications with confirmed Job Profile codes (Disability Analyst 1 = 5926, Disability Analyst 2 = 5927, Disability Analysis and Adjudication Manager 3 = 7193) but ESTIMATED salary ranges only — the OR DAS Classification & Compensation portal is interactive and does not publish static machine-readable pay bands. Estimates: DA1 ~$50k–$65k, DA2 ~$60k–$75k, Manager 3 ~$85k–$110k, with a 2025 ZipRecruiter market average of ~$77,458. SEIU 503 / OPEU DHS Coalition CBA.

columns.name: classes.<class>.estimated_min_annual
columns.description: Estimated annual minimum (market data, not scheduled).

columns.name: classes.<class>.estimated_max_annual
columns.description: Estimated annual maximum (market data, not scheduled).

source.publisher: Oregon Department of Administrative Services (DAS) / SEIU 503 (OPEU); OR DHS Disability Determination Services
source.title: Oregon DAS Classification & Compensation (class codes confirmed; salaries estimated via ZipRecruiter)

update_cadence: ad hoc (estimates); DAS schedule updates with COLA (2.5% 2026-02-01, 4% 2027-01-01)
notes: Computed (≈ estimate): class codes 5926/5927/7193 are confirmed against the OR DAS portal, but all salary figures are ZipRecruiter market estimates — the DAS portal is interactive-only with no static PDF, so scheduled pay-band ranges and step progressions were not extracted. Do not treat min/max as bargaining-grade. SEIU Local 503 / OPEU DHS Coalition CBA (2023-2025; 2025-2027 in negotiation).
